tcgdex_preflight_detail: TCGDex reachable for audit slice; fetched 100/100 cards from API.
db_card_source: SQLAlchemy AsyncSession query on cards ordered by name, set_abbrev, set_number, tcgdex_id
continuation_reason: 100 cards audited (>= 100 minimum). Target of 25 findings not reached with 6 fixes in this slice. 77 behavioral-unverified rows remain. 4 out-of-window fixes included as ledger entries seqs 101-104. Next run resumes at Miraidon | SSP | 69 | sv08-069.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Overvolt Discharge
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Attach up to 3 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to your Lightning Pokemon in any way you like. If you do, this Pokemon is Knocked Out.
tcgdex_effects_extracted.reason: active ability with energy attachment, zone-move, and self-KO effect

assertions: svp-153:Overvolt Discharge in reg._ability_effects (active, not passive)
resolve_ability invoked through normal ability path
up to 3 Basic Energy cards move from discard to Lightning Pokemon
condition returns False when no Basic Energy remain in discard

audit_ledger.notes: FIX: Magneton (svp-153) Overvolt Discharge was registered via register_passive_ability — handler was never wired and ability silently did nothing. Fixed to register_ability with _overvolt_discharge + _cond_overvolt_discharge (same as sv08-059). Regression test: test_magneton_overvolt_discharge_registered_as_active_ability. Also fixed _cond_overvolt_discharge to include svp-153 ID (was sv08-059-only check).

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: If any of your other Ancient Pokemon attacked last turn, this attack does 150 more damage.
tcgdex_effects_extracted.reason: conditional damage bonus with Ancient-type filter requires handler

implementation_evidence.source_evidence: attacks.py _koraidon_onslaught_flag — any(p.last_attack_name for p in player.bench if _is_ancient(p))

assertions: bonus applied with Ancient bench member

audit_ledger.notes: FIX (out-of-window): Koraidon Unrelenting Onslaught (sv08-116) lacked _is_ancient() filter — any bench Pokemon with last_attack_name triggered +150 bonus. Fixed with _is_ancient(p) guard. Regression tests: test_koraidon_onslaught_bonus_with_ancient_bench / test_koraidon_onslaught_no_bonus_with_non_ancient_bench.

audit_ledger.notes: FIX (out-of-window): Alcremie ex Confectionary Gift (sv09-075) used player.active as caster, failing when Alcremie ex was on the bench. Fixed to _find_in_play(player, action.card_instance_id). Regression test: test_confectionary_gift_from_bench_heals_target.
